items.definition_en: Monday is the first day of the week for many people.
items.example_en: I start my new job on Monday.

items.definition_en: Tuesday is the day after Monday.
items.example_en: We have English class on Tuesday.

items.definition_en: Wednesday is the third day of the week.
items.example_en: The meeting is on Wednesday.

items.definition_en: Thursday comes after Wednesday.
items.example_en: We go shopping every Thursday.

items.definition_en: Friday is the day before the weekend.
items.example_en: I relax at home on Friday night.

items.definition_en: Saturday is usually a day off from work or school.
items.example_en: We play football every Saturday.

items.definition_en: Sunday is the last day of the week for many people.
items.example_en: My family has lunch together on Sunday.

items.definition_en: Today is the present day.
items.example_en: What are your plans for today?

items.definition_en: Tomorrow is the day after today.
items.example_en: I will call you tomorrow.

items.definition_en: Yesterday is the day before today.
items.example_en: It rained a lot yesterday.

items.definition_en: A morning routine is the usual things you do after you wake up.
items.example_en: I drink coffee as part of my morning routine.

items.definition_en: A calendar date is a specific day in the calendar.
items.example_en: Please write today’s calendar date on the form.

items.definition_en: An anniversary is the date when something important happened before.
items.example_en: Their wedding anniversary is in June.

items.definition_en: A birthday is the date on which you were born.
items.example_en: My birthday is in August.

items.definition_en: A date is a particular day of the month or year.
items.example_en: What is the date today?

items.definition_en: A season is one of the four times of the year: spring, summer, autumn or winter.
items.example_en: Spring is my favorite season.

items.definition_en: A schedule is a plan of events and times.
items.example_en: I have a busy schedule today.

items.definition_en: A calendar is a chart that shows the days of the year.
items.example_en: I wrote our meeting in my calendar.

items.definition_en: The holiday season is the time of year when people celebrate holidays.
items.example_en: We travel a lot during the holiday season.

items.definition_en: A birthdate is the exact date when a person was born.
items.example_en: You need to write your birthdate on this form.
